assessment_items.question_content:
What were some features of Mahayana Buddhism that allowed it to be easily adopted by new cultures?

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Filial piety is a Confucian ideal.

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following was true of Arianism, a Germanic sect of Christianity? 

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Arianism spread in the Roman empire due to the work of Arian missionaries, not the pope.

choices.content: It was deemed heresy by mainstream Christians.
It was accepted as a viable form of Christianity at the Council of Nicaea.
It spread in the Roman Empire due to the work of the pope.

assessment_items.question_content:
Which of the following is an example of syncretism?

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: A Christian gravestone with the Chinese zodiac on it
King Ashoka sponsoring Buddhist missions in India
The popularity of Hinduism in India
